PaedsEngage Clinic Finder

Find participating paediatric GP clinics near you.

Search by area, clinic, doctor, and opening hours. Then view the matching clinics on Google Maps.

Find a clinic near you
👦

What is PaedsENGAGE?

PaedsENGAGE is a pilot programme led by KK Women’s and Children’s Hospital (KKH) and National University Hospital (NUH) that partners trained GP clinics to manage mild to moderate childhood conditions in the community, while helping children who need emergency care get referred appropriately.

Learn more on the official KKH PaedsENGAGE website.

Disclaimer: This is not a Singapore Government website. Information shown here is based on the Participating PaedsENGAGE Clinics PDF marked accurate as of 13 April 2026. This site is for reference only and the clinic data has been fully parsed by AI. Always call the clinic to confirm doctor availability before visiting.

About this site

This page was created with OpenClaw by Benjamin Cheng. This independent site is not affiliated with or endorsed by KKH, NUH, or PaedsENGAGE. Clinic information is based on publicly available PaedsENGAGE materials and should be verified with the clinic before visiting.
